query: SHOW COLUMNS FROM allocation_run_orders; SHOW CREATE TABLE allocation_run_orders;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4NCq8mAsshAuKGA.2865343ca485 --database K5ogkLhSXtccCnqH4Vm3fs --execute SHOW COLUMNS FROM allocation_run_orders; SHOW CREATE TABLE allocation_run_orders;
stdout:
Field	Type	Null	Key	Default	Extra
id	int	NO	PRI	NULL	auto_increment
runId	int	NO		NULL	
orderId	int	NO		NULL	
referenceNum	varchar(256)	YES		NULL	
status	enum('allocated','skipped','failed','unallocated')	NO		NULL	
skipReason	text	YES		NULL	
allocationDetail	json	YES		NULL	
createdAt	timestamp	NO		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	
Table	Create Table
allocation_run_orders	CREATE TABLE `allocation_run_orders` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `runId` int NOT NULL,
  `orderId` int NOT NULL,
  `referenceNum` varchar(256) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('allocated','skipped','failed','unallocated') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `skipReason` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `allocationDetail` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
